description: A small, controllable request pool for the Customer Agent in the Service scenario. The runner can randomly sample from these to simulate diverse user requests.
requests: Hi, the phone I bought from your store last month stopped turning on today.
Hello, the cup I ordered arrived cracked when I opened the package.
I received the wrong color for the phone case I ordered.
The shoes I bought feel like a different size than what I ordered.
My package shows delivered, but I can’t find it anywhere.
The charger I bought last week is overheating during use.
The screen protector I received doesn’t match the model I selected.
I was charged twice for my order on my bank statement.
The item I received looks used even though I ordered new.
I want to understand your return and exchange policy for electronics.
What is your trade-in policy for older phones?
How long is the warranty period for products bought from your official store?
What are the conditions for refunds if a product is defective?
I’m trying to buy a pair of shoes from your store—what’s the checkout process?
Can you tell me whether international orders are eligible for exchanges?
